title: iPSC-derived Hepatocyte TF Perturbseq
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"98qur","text":"This protocol describes methods for performing TF Perturbseq in iPSC-derived hepatocytes. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8m2i","text":"accutase (Sigma-Aldrich, SCR005)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e1i6h","text":"mTeSR Plus (Stemcell Technologies, 100-0276)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"32h1p","text":"Rock inhibitor (Stemcell Technologies, 72304)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"17pia","text":"RPMI-1640 (Gibco, 11875093)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2e5d","text":"B-27 supplement minus insulin (Gibco, A1895601)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"amhik","text":"1X Penicillin-Streptomycin (Gibco, 15140122)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cf736","text":"CHIR99021 (Stemcell Technologies, 72054; Cayman Chemical, 13122)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2lokp","text":"Recombinant Human/Murine/Rat Activin A (Peprotech, 120-14P)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bpd3a","text":"versene (Gibco, 15040066)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6vbq8","text":"B-27 supplement (Gibco, 17504044)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2n8bh","text":"DMSO (Sigma-Aldrich, D2650)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3mvqe","text":"BMP4 (Peprotech, 120-05-50UG)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bl66i","text":"bFGF (Peprotech, 100-18B)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8a9fs","text":"HGF (Peprotech, 100-39H) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ct7e6","text":"HCM Hepatocyte Culture Medium BulletKit plus media (Lonza, CC-3198)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fgnsa","text":"recombinant human oncostatin M (Peprotech, 300-10)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"86saa","text":"100 nM Dexamethasone (Sigma-Aldrich, D4902)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Day 0: Using accutase (Sigma-Aldrich, SCR005), WTC11 iPSCs were passaged and lentivirally transduced at a high MOI (~3) onto matrigel-coated plates at a density of 10,000 cells/cm2 in mTeSR Plus (Stemcell Technologies, 100-0276) supplemented with 10 uM Rock inhibitor (Stemcell Technologies, 72304)
Day 1: Media was changed with mTeSR Plus (Stemcell Technologies, 100-0276)
Days 2-3: Media was changed with mTeSR Plus (Stemcell Technologies, 100-0276) supplemented with 1 ug/mL puromycin

Day 4: Using accutase (Sigma-Aldrich, SCR005), hPSCs were passaged onto matrigel-coated plates at a density of 20,000 cells/cm2 in mTeSR Plus (Stemcell Technologies, 100-0276) supplemented with 10 uM Rock inhibitor (Stemcell Technologies, 72304)

Days 5-7: Within the first 16 hours, media was replaced and maintained for 3 days with definitive endoderm media consisting of RPMI-1640 (Gibco, 11875093) supplemented with 2% B-27 supplement minus insulin (Gibco, A1895601), 1X Penicillin-Streptomycin (Gibco, 15140122), 3 uM CHIR99021 (Stemcell Technologies, 72054; Cayman Chemical, 13122), and 100 ng/mL Recombinant Human/Murine/Rat Activin A (Peprotech, 120-14P)

Day 8: Wells were briefly (~30 seconds) rinsed with versene (Gibco, 15040066) before adding hepatic specified media consisting of RPMI-1640 (Gibco, 11875093) supplemented with 2% B-27 supplement (Gibco, 17504044), 1X Penicillin-Streptomycin (Gibco, 15140122), 0.5% DMSO (Sigma-Aldrich, D2650), 20 ng/ml BMP4 (Peprotech, 120-05-50UG), and 10 ng/ml bFGF (Peprotech, 100-18B)
Days 9-12: Media was changed with hepatic specified media

Days 13-17: Cells were then maintained for 5 days with daily media changes in hepatoblast media made of RPMI-1640 (Gibco, 11875093) supplemented with 2% B-27 supplement (Gibco, 17504044), 1X Penicillin-Streptomycin (Gibco, 15140122), 0.5% DMSO (Sigma-Aldrich, D2650), and 20 ng/ml HGF (Peprotech, 100-39H)

Days 18-22: Cells were maintained for 5 days with daily media changes in mature hepatocyte media consisting of HCM Hepatocyte Culture Medium BulletKit plus media (Lonza, CC-3198) omitting EGF supplemented with 0.5% DMSO (Sigma-Aldrich, D2650), 20 ng/mL recombinant human HGF (Peprotech, 100-39H), 20 ng/mL recombinant human oncostatin M (Peprotech, 300-10), and 100 nM Dexamethasone (Sigma-Aldrich, D4902)

Day 23: o Washed 48 wells 1X with PBS o Added 1 mL of Tryple-express to each well o Let sit 25 minutes at 37C o Resuspended with gentle pipetting into 50 mL tube filled with mature hepatocyte media o Filtered through 70 um filter o Spun at 0.3 RCF for 5 minutes o Resuspended in 3 mL 0.04% BSA (made from 10% stock and PBS) and counted o Spun again at 0.3 RCF for 5 minutes o Resuspended with 0.04% BSA and filtered through 30 uM filter
creator: Andrea R Daniel
